programme.title: Planet Earth: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Life on the edge of frozen seas near the North and South poles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Mountain ranges, perpetual night, pressure and temperature extremes create unusual life forms.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: While on a tour of the White House with his young daughter, a Capitol policeman springs into action to save his child and protect the president from a heavily armed group of paramilitary invaders.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: U.S. soldiers encounter heavy fire while trying to capture a warlord's associates in Mogadishu, Somalia.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: After the world's great cities fall, a Marine staff sergeant (Aaron Eckhart) and his platoon make a last stand against alien invaders.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A New Jersey man (Tom Cruise) and his two children face an epic battle for survival when hostile aliens invade Earth.

programme.title: Predator
programme.desc: On a mission in a Central American jungle, a team of commandos headed by Major Dutch Schaefer find themselves hunted by a fierce extra-terrestrial warrior.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A New Jersey man (Tom Cruise) and his two children face an epic battle for survival when hostile aliens invade Earth.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: After the world's great cities fall, a Marine staff sergeant (Aaron Eckhart) and his platoon make a last stand against alien invaders.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats
programme.desc: The Coastal Forest in Canada is home to the largest aggregations of North American predators.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: From the bone-dry deserts of the Atacama, where penguins weave their way through a minefield of snapping sea lions, to the lush cloud forests of the Andes, South America is full of unusual and ingenious wildlife.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: U.S. soldiers encounter heavy fire while trying to capture a warlord's associates in Mogadishu, Somalia.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: U.S. soldiers encounter heavy fire while trying to capture a warlord's associates in Mogadishu, Somalia.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie jeopardizes Alan's divorce settlement by sleeping with his attorney, Laura (Heather Locklear).

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie attempts to cure Alan of his recent bout of sleepwalking; Jake sees a therapist (Jane Lynch).

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie tries to sweet talk Judith's divorcee support-group into letting Jake continue to spend weekends at his place.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan learns that Charlie belongs to an exclusive men's group, and he begs his brother to let him join.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Judith is dating Jake's pediatrician (Ryan Stiles), and Alan is upset until Charlie points out that if she remarries, his alimony payments will end.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie tries to save Jake from school suspension by romancing his teacher, but the results are unfortunate.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie's mother, Evelyn, asks to borrow his Mercedes so she can impress a Saudi prince who she wants to buy real estate.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie meets his match when he falls for a woman who is better at playing hard to get than he is.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan denies having shoplifted a toy as a child and fears he has a dark side, until Charlie admits he planted the toy on Alan to stay out of trouble himself.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan hire Berta's sister (Camryn Manheim) to cater a party their mother has conned them into throwing for her.

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: A human killing machine (Arnold Schwarzenegger) and an airline hostess (Rae Dawn Chong) take on an ousted dictator's (Dan Hedaya) private army.

programme.title: Predator
programme.desc: On a mission in a Central American jungle, a team of commandos headed by Major Dutch Schaefer find themselves hunted by a fierce extra-terrestrial warrior.

programme.title: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: The Earth is about to be destroyed by a huge ball of fire racing toward the planet. Cornelius, an old monk, knows how to stop the burning sphere with the help of Korben Dallas, a taxi driver and former secret agent and a woman named Leeloo.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a promising mathematician who was involved in a turbulent relationship with a college professor.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis become entangled in the Russian mafia while investigating two murders with a speechless child as the only witness.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy must link jailed Russian mob suspects to money laundering and murder before their release on technicalities.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy aims to prosecute both the suspect and the gun manufacturer after a shooting spree in Central Park kills 15 people.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives suspect a 10-year-old girl is responsible for the death of a boy at a construction site.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A judge maintains her husband's innocence after a botched murder attempt leaves her mortally wounded.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A scandal involving two wealthy families threatens McCoy and Carmichael's chances of a conviction in the murder of a drug-addicted girl of 15.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: Questions about how animals adapt to the worlds built by the planet's most invasive species, humans; a search for loot to steal with macaques in Bali; hunting for easy eats with bears in Lake Tahoe; whale poo help fish populations bounce back.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: Animals fight to survive extremes, from tundra to deserts, mountain summits to deep underground.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: Exploring forests as hidden worlds where the lives of animals are entwined, including temperate forests home to whistling wild dogs, as well as rainforests where ninja treehoppers fight off assassin bugs.

programme.title: Fox & Friends Weekend
programme.desc: FOX & Friends Weekend, hosted by Rachel Campos-Duffy and Charlie Hurt, highlights the latest in news, entertainment, politics, and sports.

programme.desc: Analysis of recent economic developments and interviews with business leaders and newsmakers.

programme.title: Marilyn Monroe: Fascination
programme.desc: From childhood poverty, neglect and loneliness to premature death, Marilyn Monroe endured criticism, insecurities, drug dependence, miscarriages and broken marriages, yet she managed to parlay her beauty, talent and quick wit into a Hollywood career.

programme.title: Momo : The Sam Giancana Story
programme.desc: The incredible evidence into Sam Giancana's connections to the Kennedy family; how he delivered 3 states for JFK's election and his potential role in Marilyn Monroe's death.

programme.desc: An examination of the conspiracy theories behind who assassinated John F. Kennedy.

programme.desc: Experts and former citizens of communist and socialist countries discuss socialism in America by sharing historical similarities and personal experiences.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: It is vital for us to understand how to deal with self-deception, how to recognize it, what to do when it shows up and then how to stay out of it.

programme.title: PowerPoint With Jack Graham
programme.desc: Dr. Jack Graham glorifies God by spreading the word of Jesus Christ to make a positive impact on the world.

programme.title: It is Written with John Bradshaw
programme.desc: A spiritual ministry dealing with such issues as health, family values and spiritual principles.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Living in a world with moral restraints lifted, Christians must gain situational awareness to survive and thrive; this requires understanding the culture, spiritual temperature of the nation, and individual circumstances to know what to do.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: A pagan king threatened to kill his wise men because they couldn't interpret his dream, but a Jewish captive was given the secrets. Daniel chapter 2 gives one of the most amazing prophecies ever recorded-and proves God's Word can be trusted.

programme.title: Life Today
programme.desc: A man who grew up in abject poverty reveals the biblical principles to leave behind a legacy of wealth and wisdom.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Gratitude is the best evidence of living a Spirit-filled life.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: See Jesus in the Old Testament through types, shadows and Bible stories explained.

programme.title: Michael A. Youssef
programme.desc: Pastor Michael Youssef proclaims God's word to all the people around the world through the ministries of Leading The Way.

programme.title: Tim Timberlake
programme.desc: Tim Timberlake brings a message of hope and inspiration by going directly to God's Word, to provide solutions to life's toughest problems.

programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.desc: Your thoughts matter more than you think. Learn how healthy thinking can impact your physical well-being and emotional health and help you live with greater peace and strength.

programme.desc: A pagan king threatened to kill his wise men because they couldn't interpret his dream, but a Jewish captive was given the secrets. Daniel chapter 2 gives one of the most amazing prophecies ever recorded-and proves God's Word can be trusted.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: In Empty Out the Negative, Joel Osteen provides us with biblical tools to combat negative thoughts and feelings that weigh us down so that we can have the abundant life that we were meant to live.

programme.desc: Matt and Laurie Crouch host Rabbi Jonathan Cahn for a conversation filled with prophetic mysteries and biblical revelations; he shares how ancient truths connect to current events from his new book

programme.desc: Christine Caine discusses things that may hold people back and guides viewers through overcoming them.

programme.desc: A lifeline for a struggling and anxious nation; a guiding hand for those who are not ready to give up, and for those who want to find a way past the negativity before things get worse; searching for the wisdom embedded in a Christian World View.

programme.title: 2026 Open Championship
programme.desc: The 154th Open Championship concludes at Royal Birkdale Golf Club as the winner claims the trophy. Final-round pairs complete the 72-hole stroke play tournament, crowning the champion who earns the Claret Jug and a huge share of the purse.

programme.title: 2026 Tour de France
programme.desc: Stage 15 of the Tour de France is a 183.9 km mountain challenge for riders. From Champagnole to Plateau de Solaison.

programme.title: Gymnastics
programme.desc: The U.S. Classic features the nation's best women's artistic gymnasts. From PeoplesBank Arena in Hartford, Conn.

programme.title: News10NBC at Six
programme.desc: Local and regional news coverage.

programme.title: NBC Nightly News With Tom Llamas
programme.desc: Tom Llamas anchors the latest news, going beyond the headlines to see how lives are affected by the world around them.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The New York Yankees host the Los Angeles Dodgers at Yankee Stadium in Game 3 of a three-game series. First baseman Ben Rice anchors the Yankees, while designated hitter Shohei Ohtani paces the Dodgers in an interleague regular-season showdown.

programme.title: Password
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon and celebrity guest The Miz pair up with contestants and face off over two games; hosted by Keke Palmer, players must guess secret passwords using only one-word clues for a chance to win up to $25,000.

programme.title: Suits
programme.desc: Harvey and Mike are at odds over their strategy for Mike's trial, and the lengths they will go to, to ensure their defeat of Gibbs.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: John Ward and his crew are called to salvage a massive barge upturned by a storm in a canal; Hickory Scuba Divers work to salvage a valuable sailboat that's sunk at its mooring.

programme.title: Raw Travel
programme.desc: Rob and Ukrainian videographer Anastasia explore Polish cities, large and small.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A matriarch's death leads to a prominent family from Texas being torn apart by decades of betrayal, greed and mistrust.
